_comment_chrome_profile: DEPRECATED (ISSUES #17): the harvester no longer scrapes Chrome. Credentials are pushed by the companion extension (POST /creds). This field is read for backward compat only and its path is never accessed; you can delete it.
_comment_reconciler: ISSUES #16: the reconciler is an INDEPENDENT fallback detection path that scans conversations.history for your trigger reactions, so captures keep working if Slack's hasmy: search filter wedges (the ~40h 2026-07-15 outage). It shares seen.json + the dedup key with the primary poller, so no duplicates.
_comment_reconcile_channels: OPTIONAL. Fallback list of channel IDs to scan, used ONLY if users.conversations is not callable by the token. Normally omit this — the reconciler auto-discovers your active channels/DMs via users.conversations. Example: ["C0123", "D0456"].
